key.name: work-duration
key.description: Duration of each work session in minutes (1-60)

key.name: short-break-duration
key.description: Duration of short breaks in minutes (1-30)

key.name: long-break-duration
key.description: Duration of long breaks in minutes (1-60)

key.name: long-break-interval
key.description: Number of work sessions before a long break (2-8)

key.name: auto-start-breaks
key.description: Automatically start break timer after work session ends

key.name: auto-start-work
key.description: Automatically start work timer after break ends

key.name: strict-mode
key.description: When enabled, hides pause and skip buttons during work sessions to force focus

key.name: show-notifications
key.description: Show desktop notifications when timers complete

key.name: play-sound-notifications
key.description: Play a notification sound when a timer finishes

key.name: work-bar-color
key.description: Color of the work progress bar (hex)

key.name: break-bar-color
key.description: Color of the break progress bar (hex)

key.name: idle-bar-color
key.description: Color of the pulsing bars when idle (hex)

key.name: bar-height
key.description: Height of the progress bars (2-8)

key.name: bar-width
key.description: Width of the progress bars (60-300)

key.name: bar-radius
key.summary: Progress bar border radius in pixels
key.description: Radius for corners (0-99)

key.name: color-saturation
key.description: Adjust the color saturation (0.0 to 2.0)

key.name: glow-intensity
key.description: Glow effect spread in pixels

key.name: heart-color
key.description: Color of the heart outline when not filled by progress (hex)

key.name: heart-outline-color
key.description: Color of the progress outline around the heart (hex)

key.name: icon-style
key.description: Selected panel icon style: heart-outline, heart-solid, ring, flame

key.name: theme-name
key.description: Currently selected theme (default, black-pink)

key.name: sessions-completed
key.description: Number of pomodoro sessions completed today

key.name: total-focus-minutes
key.description: Total minutes of focused work today

key.name: all-time-focus-minutes
key.description: Total minutes of focused work all time

key.name: last-session-date
key.description: Date string of last session for daily reset

key.name: tasks
key.description: JSON array of tasks: [{text, category, done, id, completedAt, pomodorosSpent}]

key.name: task-stats
key.description: JSON object: time spent per category today (minutes)

key.name: analytics-history
key.description: JSON array of daily analytics entries for the past 30 days

key.name: best-streak
key.description: Longest consecutive days with at least 1 pomodoro

key.name: bday-surprise
key.description: Trigger birthday surprise animation

key.name: timer-command
key.description: Command string from preferences to extension: start-work, start-short-break, start-long-break, pause, resume, skip, reset, idle

key.name: timer-category
key.description: Focus category selected in prefs for the current session

key.name: timer-state
key.description: idle, work, short_break, long_break

key.name: timer-start-time
key.description: GLib.get_monotonic_time() when timer started/resumed

key.name: timer-elapsed-accumulated
key.description: Seconds elapsed before the current running segment

key.name: timer-duration-secs
key.description: Total duration for current timer

key.name: timer-is-paused
key.description: True if currently paused
